00030 #ifndef _ENDIAN_H_
00031 #define _ENDIAN_H_
00032 
00033 #include <kern/endian.h>
00034 
00035 /*
00036  * Byte swap functions for the kernel.
00037  */
00038 
00039 uint16_t bswap16(uint16_t);
00040 uint32_t bswap32(uint32_t);
00041 uint64_t bswap64(uint64_t);
00042 
00043 uint16_t ntohs(uint16_t);
00044 uint16_t htons(uint16_t);
00045 uint32_t ntohl(uint32_t);
00046 uint32_t htonl(uint32_t);
00047 uint64_t ntohll(uint64_t);
00048 uint64_t htonll(uint64_t);
00049 
00050 /* Utility functions for handling 64-bit values; see bswap.c for description */
00051 void join32to64(uint32_t x1, uint32_t x2, uint64_t *y2);
00052 void split64to32(uint64_t x, uint32_t *y1, uint32_t *y2);
00053 
00054 
00055 #endif /* _ENDIAN_H_ */
